---
listing:
  categories: true
  contents:
  - '*.qmd'
  feed: true
  filter-ui: false
  sort: date desc
  sort-ui: false
  type: default
page-layout: full
title: Projects
# description: Some of my projects: from short explorations to months-long endeavors.
title-block-banner: false
---

A collection of projects that I've worked on and written about. Mostly focused on biosignal processing and machine learning.
